hero.title: Restore Any Video with One-Step AI
hero.description:
SeedVR2 is the most advanced AI video restoration model.
Upscale to 4K, remove noise, and enhance video quality instantly.
hero.tip: ⚡ One-step diffusion - 10x faster than traditional methods

features.title: Why Choose SeedVR2 for Video Restoration
features.description: State-of-the-art AI video enhancement powered by diffusion transformer technology.

items.title: Video Super Resolution
items.description: Upscale low-resolution videos to 4K quality. Perfect for old footage, compressed videos, and AIGC content.

items.title: AI Denoising
items.description: Remove grain, compression artifacts, and noise while preserving fine details and textures.

items.title: One-Step Processing
items.description: 10x faster than traditional diffusion models. Restore videos in seconds, not minutes.

items.title: Any Resolution Support
items.description: Process videos at any resolution without quality loss. No fixed size limitations.

items.title: Temporal Consistency
items.description: Maintain smooth motion and consistent quality across all frames. No flickering or artifacts.

items.title: AIGC Video Enhancement
items.description: Specially optimized for AI-generated videos. Fix common AIGC artifacts and improve quality.

usage.title: How to Restore Your Videos
usage.description: Three simple steps to enhance your video quality with SeedVR2:

items.title: Upload Your Video
items.description: Upload any video file - old footage, compressed videos, or AIGC content. We support all common formats.

items.title: Choose Restoration Mode
items.description: Select from upscaling, denoising, or full enhancement. Our AI automatically optimizes settings for best results.

items.title: Download Enhanced Video
items.description: Get your restored video in minutes. Download in high quality and share anywhere.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About SeedVR2
faq.description: Have more questions? Contact us at support@seedvr2.ai

items.question: What is SeedVR2 and how does it work?
items.answer: SeedVR2 is an advanced AI video restoration model developed by ByteDance Seed team. It uses one-step diffusion technology to upscale, denoise, and enhance videos 10x faster than traditional methods while maintaining superior quality.

items.question: What types of videos can SeedVR2 restore?
items.answer: SeedVR2 can restore any type of video including old footage, compressed videos, low-resolution clips, and AI-generated content. It's specially optimized for both real-world and AIGC video restoration.

items.question: How long does video restoration take?
items.answer: Thanks to our one-step diffusion technology, SeedVR2 processes videos 10x faster than traditional diffusion-based methods. Most videos are restored within minutes depending on length and resolution.

items.question: What resolution can SeedVR2 upscale to?
items.answer: SeedVR2 supports arbitrary resolution output without fixed size limitations. You can upscale videos up to 4K (2160p) or even higher depending on your subscription plan.

items.question: Is SeedVR2 based on published research?
items.answer: Yes, SeedVR2 is based on peer-reviewed research published at CVPR 2025 (Highlight). The technology is developed by ByteDance Seed team and the model weights are available on Hugging Face.

items.question: What video formats are supported?
items.answer: SeedVR2 supports all common video formats including MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM. Output is delivered in high-quality MP4 format for maximum compatibility.

cta.title: Ready to Restore Your Videos?
cta.description: Experience the power of one-step AI video restoration with SeedVR2.
